title: Cuneiform Tablet #0794: Ur III Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
